attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
   OFFSET.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
   ,ROW_NUMBER() over (order by OFFSET.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, OFFSET.BK_SS_CD ) + SM_MAX.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT as BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,OFFSET.BK_SS_CD                      
   ,OFFSET.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
   ,OFFSET.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
   ,OFFSET.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      
   ,OFFSET.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
   ,OFFSET.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
   ,OFFSET.LINE_TYPE_CD                  
   ,OFFSET.SPLIT_PCT                     
   ,OFFSET.GL_DTM                        
   ,OFFSET.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
   ,OFFSET.RULE_START_DTM                
   ,OFFSET.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            
   ,OFFSET.LAST_RECORD_FLG               
   ,OFFSET.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        
   ,OFFSET.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
   ,OFFSET.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,OFFSET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
   ,OFFSET.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        
   ,OFFSET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
   ,OFFSET.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,OFFSET.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,OFFSET.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,OFFSET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,OFFSET.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,OFFSET.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,OFFSET.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,OFFSET.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  
   ,OFFSET.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  
   ,OFFSET.PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,OFFSET.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
   ,OFFSET.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
   ,OFFSET.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           
   ,OFFSET.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
   ,OFFSET.DV_MISC_FLG                   
   ,OFFSET.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
   ,OFFSET.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
   ,OFFSET.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
   ,OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
   ,OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  
   ,OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT           
   ,OFFSET.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
   ,OFFSET.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
   ,OFFSET.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          
   ,OFFSET.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM 
   ,OFFSET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
   ,OFFSET.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   
   ,OFFSET.SHIPPED_DT                    
   ,OFFSET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           
   ,OFFSET.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT 
   ,OFFSET.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         
   ,OFFSET.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
   ,OFFSET.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                
   ,OFFSET.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY 
   ,OFFSET.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
   ,OFFSET.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               
   ,OFFSET.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        
   ,OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT         
   ,OFFSET.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     
   ,OFFSET.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       
   ,OFFSET.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
   ,OFFSET.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          
   ,OFFSET.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
   ,OFFSET.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         
   ,OFFSET.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
   ,OFFSET.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
   ,OFFSET.SALES_REP_NUM                 
   ,OFFSET.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
   ,OFFSET.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     
   ,OFFSET.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
   ,OFFSET.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,OFFSET.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD    
   ,OFFSET.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               
   ,OFFSET.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            
   ,OFFSET.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD    
   ,OFFSET.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,OFFSET.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
   ,OFFSET.DV_TRX_AMT                    
   ,OFFSET.DV_FUNC_AMT                   
   ,OFFSET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
   ,OFFSET.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
   ,OFFSET.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  
   ,OFFSET.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   
   ,OFFSET.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,OFFSET.XAAS_OA_FLAG   
   ,OFFSET.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT    
   ,OFFSET.POS_TRX_ID_INT
   ,OFFSET.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
   ,OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
   ,OFFSET.POB_TYPE_CD 
   ,OFFSET.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5 
   ,OFFSET.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
   ,OFFSET.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG 
   ,OFFSET.BDL_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,OFFSET.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,OFFSET.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,OFFSET.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
   FROM
   (SELECT 
   REV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
   ,REV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,REV.BK_SS_CD                      
   ,REV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1    GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
   ,REV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
   ,REV.LINE_TYPE_CD                  
   ,REV.SPLIT_PCT * -1   SPLIT_PCT                   
   ,REV.GL_DTM                        
   ,REV.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
   ,REV.RULE_START_DTM                
   ,REV.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            
   ,'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG               
   ,REV.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        
   ,REV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT      
   ,REV.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE   
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT    
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,REV.AR_TRX_KEY  
   ,REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY               
   ,REV.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  
   ,REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,REV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
   ,REV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
   ,REV.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           
   ,REV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
   ,REV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
   ,REV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
   ,REV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
   ,REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * -1     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  * -1 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT * -1        DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
   ,REV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY * -1          DV_EXTENDED_QTY        
   ,REV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
   ,REV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          
   ,REV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM 
   ,REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
   ,REV.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   
   ,REV.SHIPPED_DT                    
   ,REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           
   ,REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY   
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT * -1 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ,REV.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         
   ,REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
   ,REV.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                
   ,REV.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY 
   ,REV.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
   ,REV.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               
   ,REV.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT * -1      DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  
   ,REV.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     
   ,REV.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       
   ,REV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
   ,REV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          
   ,REV.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         
   ,REV.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
   ,REV.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
   ,REV.SALES_REP_NUM                 
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
   ,REV.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     
   ,REV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
   ,REV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,REV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            
   ,REV.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               
   ,REV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            
   ,REV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD    
   ,REV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,REV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
   ,REV.DV_TRX_AMT                    
   ,REV.DV_FUNC_AMT                   
   ,REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
   ,REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
   ,REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   ,'OFFSET' DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
   ,REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,REV.XAAS_OA_FLAG   
   ,REV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   ,REV.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
   ,REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * -1 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT       
   ,REV.POB_TYPE_CD   
   ,REV.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5    
   ,REV.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG  
   ,REV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG   
   ,REV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS BDL_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,REV.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT * -1 AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,REV.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT * -1 AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,REV.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
  FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P REV
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
     ON REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE (NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' OR NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME='MERAKI-LICENSE' /*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI Q2FY19*/)
 AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='BUNDLE'
 AND REV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV')
 AND REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY>0
 UNION ALL /*TO GENERATE OFFSET FOR NET CHANGE BUNDLE RECORDS*/
 SELECT 
   REV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
   ,REV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,REV.BK_SS_CD                      
   ,REV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1    GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
   ,REV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
   ,REV.LINE_TYPE_CD                  
   ,REV.SPLIT_PCT * -1   SPLIT_PCT                   
   ,REV.GL_DTM                        
   ,REV.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
   ,REV.RULE_START_DTM                
   ,REV.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            
   ,'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG               
   ,REV.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        
   ,REV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT      
   ,REV.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE   
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT    
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,REV.AR_TRX_KEY  
   ,REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY               
   ,REV.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  
   ,REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,REV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
   ,REV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
   ,REV.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           
   ,REV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
   ,REV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
   ,REV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
   ,REV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
   ,REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * -1     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  * -1 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT * -1        DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
   ,REV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY * -1          DV_EXTENDED_QTY        
   ,REV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
   ,REV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          
   ,REV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM 
   ,REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
   ,REV.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   
   ,REV.SHIPPED_DT                    
   ,REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           
   ,REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY   
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT * -1 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ,REV.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         
   ,REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
   ,REV.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                
   ,REV.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY 
   ,REV.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
   ,REV.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               
   ,REV.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT * -1      DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  
   ,REV.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     
   ,REV.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       
   ,REV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
   ,REV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          
   ,REV.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         
   ,REV.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
   ,REV.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
   ,REV.SALES_REP_NUM                 
   ,REV.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
   ,REV.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     
   ,REV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
   ,REV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,REV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            
   ,REV.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               
   ,REV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            
   ,REV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD    
   ,REV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,REV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
   ,REV.DV_TRX_AMT                    
   ,REV.DV_FUNC_AMT                   
   ,REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
   ,REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
   ,REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   ,'OFFSET' DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
   ,REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG   
   ,REV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   ,REV.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
   ,REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
   ,REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * -1 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT       
   ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(10))AS POB_TYPE_CD   
   ,CAST('N' AS VARCHAR(250)) AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5    
   ,'N' AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG  
   ,'N' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG   
   ,REV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS BDL_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,REV.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,REV.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ATRBTN_REF REV
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
     ON REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE (NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' OR NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME='MERAKI-LICENSE' /*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI Q2FY19*/)
 AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='BUNDLE'
 AND REV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV')
 AND REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY>0
  )OFFSET
  INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM
 (
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REVB
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ATRBTN_REF
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_NA_P
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ACC_ADJ_KEY_CG
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ADJ_FLAG_CG
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ADJ_MERGE_CG
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ADJ_AMOUNT_CG
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG
 ) SM) SM_MAX 
 ON 1=1

SELECT    /* OA Q1FY15 - RAEREV/RAECOGS */
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
                  CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND  /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
             ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
              OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','OM-FBINV')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
			  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
             AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
			  THEN -9999
             WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND  /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
             ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN ('XAAS'))
			  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			  ) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN -6666 
             WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N'  AND /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
             ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
              OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN ('XAAS'))
			  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			  )		 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
    FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
              CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS*/
          ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		    OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)  ELSE -9999 END SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY   ELSE  FNL.PRODUCT_KEY  END  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y ' THEN 'ATTRIBUTED' ELSE  'STANDALONE'    END  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
      FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS Change */
   ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
     INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
     AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN 
      (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
      NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
     NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE              
      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
      ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
      ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
      ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /*END*/
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
      ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
     WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
     AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='N'
     AND FNL.TSV_FLAG='N'
     /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA-Q1FY16 to restrixt XAAS-OA data*/
   
     /*Added the below code as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA-Q1FY16 to Derive OA columns of XAAS-OA data*/ 
UNION ALL   
SELECT
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
        CASE WHEN  FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
          WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CDC'  THEN CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER) END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
          CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
         ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
           OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		   )		 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER)
             ELSE CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
   FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         CASE WHEN FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG = 'Y'  THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
        EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        NP.ITEM_KEY  AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
        NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE = 'MULTIPLE Performance Obligations (MPOB)' THEN 'MPOB' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  POB_TYPE_CD /*NRS Change */
	 ,CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN BUNDLE_TYPE ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
    ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
       ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
       AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
       AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
       ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
       AND SATL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
       ON FNL.SK_TRX_ID_INT = CAST(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS BIGINT)
    AND SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution'   
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID  
     AND SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
       ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EXT_ALL.SKU 
     WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG IN ('Y','O')
           AND FNL.TSV_FLAG='N' AND EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG='N'
     UNION ALL
     
     SELECT
         FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
         CASE WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN  CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
        WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD =  'CDC' THEN  CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER)  END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
       CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
         ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
           OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		   )		 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER)
              ELSE CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
           CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
          ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
            OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			)		  /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
              ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         COALESCE(CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT),-9999) AS  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,       
	   NOA.PRODUCT_KEY         AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
         'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      ,COALESCE(NOA_MPOB.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
	  ,COALESCE(NOA_NOAH.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
       FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRNR
     ON SRNR.COGS_PERCENT_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
     AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
    INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRNR
     ON SRNR.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID = EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
     AND  SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
     AND SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
     ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = CAST(EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS INTEGER)
     AND SATL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
     ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME  
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
  /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/
    INNER JOIN (SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
        WHERE TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM' AND ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='OFFSET' GROUP BY 1,2) NOA
        ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY,POB_TYPE_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE  /*NRS Change */
        WHERE TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM' AND POB_TYPE_CD='MPOB' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA_MPOB
        ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA_MPOB.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     AND FNL.PRODUCT_KEY=NOA_MPOB.PRODUCT_KEY
	 LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY,BUNDLE_TYPE_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE  /*NRS Change */
        WHERE TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM' AND BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA_NOAH
        ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA_NOAH.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     AND FNL.PRODUCT_KEY=NOA_NOAH.PRODUCT_KEY
    WHERE 
    FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
    AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y' AND EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG='N'
UNION ALL  
SELECT    /* OA Q1FY15 - RAEREV/RAECOGS */
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
  NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
        CASE  WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN -6666 
        WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
              ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
        FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
        NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)  ELSE -9999 END SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY   ELSE  FNL.PRODUCT_KEY  END  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y ' THEN 'ATTRIBUTED' ELSE  'STANDALONE'    END  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS Change */
		,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
        FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
        INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
        ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
        ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
        AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        INNER JOIN 
        (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
         NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
         NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE              
         FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
         INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
         ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
         ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
        LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
         ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
        AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
     /*SO/SOL DERIVATION FOR ACCRUALS*/
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
        ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
        AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
        ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
        AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
        AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
        ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
        AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='N'
     AND FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_REVENUE')
     AND FNL.TSV_FLAG='Y' and EOXRNR.WEBEX_FLAG<>'N' /*To restrict Flexi data*/
  
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
        CASE WHEN  FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
          WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CDC'  THEN CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER) END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
        NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
       CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
        FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
        NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
        EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        NART.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY  AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
        NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
       ,'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD 
	   ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
       FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
       ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
       AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
       INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
       ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
       AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
       AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
       ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
       AND SATL.SS_CODE ='CG'
       INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
       ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_LINE_REF_NUM,OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT,DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  
       WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2,3)NART
       ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM
       AND CAST(EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS BIGINT)=NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT
     INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
        ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)  
     WHERE /* FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG IN ('Y')
  AND */ FNL.TSV_FLAG='Y' and EOXRNR.WEBEX_FLAG<>'N' /*Flexi Change*/
  /*MERAKI NGCCRM CHANGES*/
  UNION ALL 
    SELECT
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
        CASE WHEN  FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
          WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CDC'  THEN CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER) END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
     CASE WHEN ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
                OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
				)	 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER)
             ELSE CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,      
	 FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         CASE WHEN FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG = 'Y'  THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
        EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        NMRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY  AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
        NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD 
	 ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
    ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
       ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
       AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
       AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
       ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
       AND SATL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/  
   INNER JOIN (SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX  
   WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2)NMRT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' AND EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG='Y'
     UNION ALL
     SELECT
         FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
         CASE WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN  CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
        WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD =  'CDC' THEN  CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER)  END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
       CASE WHEN ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	              OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
				  ) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER)
              ELSE CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
           CASE WHEN ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
                     OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
					 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
					 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
					 )	/*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 	   THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
              ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         COALESCE(CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT),-9999) AS  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,       
	   NMRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY         AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
         'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      ,'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD
	  ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
       FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRNR
     ON SRNR.COGS_PERCENT_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
     AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
    INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRNR
     ON SRNR.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID = EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
     AND  SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
     AND SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
     ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = CAST(EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS INTEGER)
     AND SATL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
     ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME  
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
  /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/
   INNER JOIN (SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX  
   WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2)NMRT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    WHERE 
    FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
    AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y' AND EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG='Y'
	
	UNION ALL /*ADDING UNION ALL TO ALLOW STANADLONE ACCRUED LINES  FOR FLEXI SCOPE*/
   
   SELECT    /* OA Q1FY15 - RAEREV/RAECOGS */
         FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
   NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
         CASE  WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN -6666 
         WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
               ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
         CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)  ELSE -9999 END SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
         CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY   ELSE  FNL.PRODUCT_KEY  END  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
         CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y ' THEN 'ATTRIBUTED' ELSE  'STANDALONE'    END  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
         ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS Change */
   ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
         FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
         INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
         ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
         INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
         ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
         AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
         INNER JOIN 
         (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
          NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
          NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE              
          FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
          INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
          ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
          ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
         LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
          ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
         AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
      /*SO/SOL DERIVATION FOR ACCRUALS*/
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
         ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
         AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
         ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
         AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
         AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
		   INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT,DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  
        WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' GROUP BY 1,2,3)NART
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
   INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)
         ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
         NSOL_INIT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
         FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
         INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
         ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
         AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
         ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)
         INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
         ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)
         WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
         AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='N'
      AND FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_REVENUE')
      AND FNL.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND EOXRNR.WEBEX_FLAG='N'
	  
	  UNION ALL /*ADDING UNION ALL TO ALLOW SUB SKU ACCRUED LINES  FOR FLEXI SCOPE*/
   SELECT
         FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
         CASE WHEN  FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
           WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CDC'  THEN CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER) END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
         NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
        CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
         EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
         NART.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY  AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
         'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        ,'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD 
     ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
        FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_RAO FNL
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
        ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
        AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
        INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
        ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
        AND SRNR.SS_CD='CG'
        AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
        ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
        AND SATL.SS_CODE ='CG'
        INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
        ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT,DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  
        WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2,3)NART
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
        AND CAST(EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS BIGINT)=NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT
      INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)
         ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
         NSOL_INIT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
         FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
         INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
         ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
         AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
         ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)
         INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
         ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS BIGINT)  
      WHERE  FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG IN ('N')
   AND  FNL.TSV_FLAG='Y'AND EOXRNR.WEBEX_FLAG='N'

SELECT  
    WDNRAM.DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
    WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT        ,
    WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD                      ,
    WDNRAM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
    WDNRAM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
    WDNRAM.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
    WDNRAM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
    WDNRAM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
    WDNRAM.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
    WDNRAM.SPLIT_PCT                     ,
    WDNRAM.GL_DTM                        ,
    WDNRAM.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
    WDNRAM.RULE_START_DTM                ,
    WDNRAM.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            ,
    WDNRAM.LAST_RECORD_FLG               ,
    WDNRAM.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
    WDNRAM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
    WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    ,
    WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     ,
    WDNRAM.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
    WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
   /* WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               , */
    CASE WHEN NROL.RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME ='Program Migration Discount' 
	THEN NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
	WDNRAM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
    WDNRAM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
    WDNRAM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
   /* WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY         , 
      WDNRAM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
      WDNRAM.AR_TRX_KEY                    , */
	CASE WHEN NROL.RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME ='Program Migration Discount' 
	THEN NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	CASE WHEN NROL.RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME ='Program Migration Discount' 
	THEN NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
	CASE WHEN NROL.RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME ='Program Migration Discount' 
	THEN NROL.AR_TRX_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.AR_TRX_KEY END AS AR_TRX_KEY,
    WDNRAM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
    WDNRAM.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
    NROL.PRODUCT_KEY                     ,
    WDNRAM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          ,
    WDNRAM.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
    WDNRAM.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
    WDNRAM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
    WDNRAM.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
    WDNRAM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
    WDNRAM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
    WDNRAM.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
    WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
    WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  ,
    WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT           ,
    WDNRAM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               ,
    WDNRAM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
    WDNRAM.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
    WDNRAM.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
    WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
    WDNRAM.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
    WDNRAM.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
    WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
    WDNRAM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
    WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
    WDNRAM.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
    WDNRAM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
    WDNRAM.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
    WDNRAM.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
    WDNRAM.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    WDNRAM.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
    WDNRAM.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
    WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT         ,
    WDNRAM.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     ,
    WDNRAM.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       ,
    WDNRAM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
    WDNRAM.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
    WDNRAM.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
    WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
    WDNRAM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
    WDNRAM.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
    WDNRAM.SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
    WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
    WDNRAM.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     ,
    CASE WHEN WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN -7777
         WHEN WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD =  'CDC' THEN -4444
    END RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
    WDNRAM.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
    WDNRAM.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
    WDNRAM.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
    WDNRAM.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
    WDNRAM.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
    WDNRAM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
    WDNRAM.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME         AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  ,
    WDNRAM.AMOUNT               AS DV_TRX_AMT         ,
    WDNRAM.ACCTD_AMOUNT        AS DV_FUNC_AMT  ,
    /* OA Q3FY14 */
   /* WDNRAM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, */
	CASE WHEN NROL.RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME ='Program Migration Discount' 
	THEN NROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	WDNRAM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
    CASE WHEN NROL.ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' THEN WDNRAM.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
    NROL.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   /* WDNRAM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, */
	CASE WHEN NROL.RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME ='Program Migration Discount' 
	THEN NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE WDNRAM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
    'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG,
    WDNRAM.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,

    NROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT              AS POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    -999 AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
    0.0000000  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
    NROL.POB_TYPE_CD,
    NULL AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
    NROL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	'N' AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	'N' AS TSV_FLG,
	'N' AS MERAKI_FLG,
	WDNRAM.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY AS REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
	NROL.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
  FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_SWSS_MERGE_CG  WDNRAM
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
     ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=WDNRAM.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
     AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN  
     (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) 
   IN ('CISCO RESIDUAL ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')   
    WHERE WDNRAM.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('SWSS_ADJ')

   AND WDNRXOA.BK_SS_CD = WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD

         FNL.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,

         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,

         FNL.BK_SS_CD,

         FNL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,

         FNL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,

         NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY  AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,

	   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ADJ_MERGE_CG FNL
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NDCA
    ON NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=FNL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY

    (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME)

 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_MERGE_CG  WDNRAM
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_OA_RMA WDNRXOA
 ON WDNRXOA.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
