 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.AMOUNT,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
/* OA Q3FY14 */
 WDNRXOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRXOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WDNRXOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WDNRXOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE_P WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE    
 /* OA Q3FY14 */
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OA WDNRXOA
 ON WDNRXOA.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
 AND WDNRXOA.BK_SS_CD = WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.BK_SS_CD
 WHERE WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_MERGE.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_COGS', 'RAE_REVENUE')

SELECT
   SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD,
   WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
   WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
   WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
   WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,
   WDNRTFR.GL_DTM,
   WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
   WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM,
   WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG AS LAST_RECORD_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
   WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
   WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
   WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
   WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
   WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
   WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
   WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT END,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT END,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY END,
   WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
   WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
   WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
   WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT,
   WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT END,
   WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,
   WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
   WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT END,
   WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
   WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
   WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
   WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
   WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_USER,
   WDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   WDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   WDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM,
   WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT,
   WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
   WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
   WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   WDNRTFR.DV_TRX_AMT ,
   WDNRTFR.DV_FUNC_AMT,
   WDNRTFR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   WDNRTFR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
   CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END,
     'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD,
     'N' NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
     'N' AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
   CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
   CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.ACTION_CODE,
   WDNRTFR.DML_TYPE,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
   CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
   FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ATRBTN_REF WDNRTFR
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
     ON (
     WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
     AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD 
     )
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT 
    ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY)
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL      
		ON /*NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY      
		AND*/ WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,TRX_SRC_CD FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXOA GROUP BY 1,2)NXOA
     ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
      SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG DV_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD LINE_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT SPLIT_PCT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DTM GL_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM RULE_START_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG AS LAST_RECORD_FLG , /*added by sabanil OAQ1FY16 */
      WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
      --WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
            CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
     ((ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   ) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	  AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N') THEN 
         NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY ELSE WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_KEY, /*ACCRUALS CHANGES JAN18*/
      WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
      CASE 
   WHEN ((WDNRTFR.TSV_FLAG='Y' OR WDNRTFR.MERAKI_FLAG='Y') AND WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' AND WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_REVENUE','RAE_COGS') AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = 'CG') THEN CAST(-7777 AS INTEGER)
   WHEN (NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('OM','XAAS','OPL') AND WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_REVENUE','RAE_COGS') AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' ) THEN CAST(-7777 AS INTEGER)
   WHEN (NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('OM','XAAS','OPL') AND WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_REVENUE','RAE_COGS') AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = 'CDC') THEN CAST(-4444 AS INTEGER)  
   ELSE
      WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*NGCCRM TSV CHANGES*/
      WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY AS  AR_TRX_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT ,
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG DV_CHARGES_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG DV_MISC_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG DV_SERVICE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
      /*Q4FY15_ICPM_OCMS_FIX*/
       /*WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY DV_EXTENDED_QTY  */
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000  
	  WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')
	     AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL'  AND WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' 
      THEN 0 ELSE DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
      WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG ,
      WDRTCN.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME ,
      WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG MAJOR_LINE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN')  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT AS CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD, 'UNKNOWN')  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
      WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
      USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
      USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM SALES_REP_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT DV_FISCAL_DT ,
      WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
      (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1
      WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
      WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1
      ELSE WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
      END) RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
      WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
      WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DV_TRX_AMT,0) AS DV_TRX_AMT,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DV_FUNC_AMT,0) AS DV_FUNC_AMT,
      -999,
      WDNRTFR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
      /* OA Q3FY14 */
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY, 
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE'),
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' THEN WDNRTFR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE  WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
       -999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
       WDNRTFR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFR.POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE  WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END,
       WDNRTFR.POB_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
      WDNRTFR.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	  CASE WHEN (WDNRTFR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND WDNRTFR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 AND WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE') THEN 'Accrual Revenue' 
	       WHEN (WDNRTFR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND WDNRTFR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME='Immediate' AND WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE') 
		   THEN 'Accrual Revenue'
	  ELSE CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(20)) END AS TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999) AS REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
	  'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
      'I' AS DML_TYPE,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	  WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
       FROM
       $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P WDNRTFR
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
      ON (
      WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD 
      )
      INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_TRX_CONTRACT_NUM_P WDRTCN 
       ON ( WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND WDRTCN.BK_SS_CD=WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD)
      INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_SRVC_FIN_ACCOUNT_PID_MAP EV
      ON (EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE=WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD)
       /*Q4FY15_ICPM_OCMS_FIX*/
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT 
     ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY)
       LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL/*Q3FY16*/
      ON /*NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
      AND */WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,TRX_SRC_CD FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXOA GROUP BY 1,2)NXOA
      ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
     ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
    ON WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
      
      UNION ALL
      
      Select 
     SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD,
     WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
     WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
     WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,
     WDNRTFR.GL_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
     WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
     --WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
     CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */ 
      ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
       OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATIL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATIL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   ) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/      
	 THEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY 
        ELSE WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
     WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT END,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT END,
       /*Q4FY15_ICPM_OCMS_FIX*/
     /*WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY, */
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000  WHEN  (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')
    	 AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL'  AND WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV'
     THEN 0 ELSE DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
     WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
     WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
     WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT,
     WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT END,
     WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,
     WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
     WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT END,
     WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
     WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
     WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
     WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_USER,
     WDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
     WDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT,
     WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
     WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
     WDNRTFR.DV_TRX_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FUNC_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
     WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
     -999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
     WDNRTFR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
     -999 POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
     'UNKNOWN'AS POB_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	 CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
	 -999 AS REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
	 WDNRTFR.ACTION_CODE,
     WDNRTFR.DML_TYPE,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
     CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	 CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
     from  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REVB WDNRTFR
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
      ON (
      WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD 
      )
        /*Q4FY15_ICPM_OCMS_FIX*/
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT 
     ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
     ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY            
   /*   ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE*/
   LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
   ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/   
   
   /*ADDED BELOW CODE AS PART OF TSV ACCRUALS CHANGE JAN18*/
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
      SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG DV_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD LINE_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT SPLIT_PCT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DTM GL_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM RULE_START_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG AS LAST_RECORD_FLG , /*added by sabanil OAQ1FY16 */
      WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
      --WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
              CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
	   WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_REVENUE') THEN WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
       WHEN ((ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')  /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	         OR  (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR  (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR  (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			 )/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  
	   AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N') THEN 
       NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY ELSE WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_KEY, /*ACCRUALS CHANGES JAN18*/
      WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY AS  AR_TRX_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT ,
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG DV_CHARGES_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG DV_MISC_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG DV_SERVICE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
      /*Q4FY15_ICPM_OCMS_FIX*/
       /*WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY DV_EXTENDED_QTY  */
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 
	  WHEN  (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')
    	  AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL'  AND WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' 
      THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
      WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG ,
      COALESCE(WDRTCN.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,NDRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM) AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME ,
      WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG MAJOR_LINE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN')  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD, 'UNKNOWN')  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
      WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
      USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
      USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM SALES_REP_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT DV_FISCAL_DT ,
      WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
      (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1
      WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
      WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1
      ELSE WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
      END) RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
      WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
      WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DV_TRX_AMT,0) AS DV_TRX_AMT,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DV_FUNC_AMT,0) AS DV_FUNC_AMT,
      -999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
      /* OA Q3FY14 */
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY, 
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE'),
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' THEN WDNRTFR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE  WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
       -999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
       WDNRTFR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
       WDNRTFR.POS_TRX_ID_INT,
       WDNRTFR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
       CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END,
       WDNRTFR.POB_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
      WDNRTFR.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	  CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
	  -999 AS REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
	  'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
      'I' AS DML_TYPE,
	  CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	  WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
       FROM
       $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_TRX_OFF_GEN_TSV_Y WDNRTFR
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
      ON (
      WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD 
      )
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_TRX_CONTRACT_NUM_P WDRTCN 
       ON ( WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =WDNRTFR.BDL_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND WDRTCN.BK_SS_CD=WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD)
	  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV NDRVD
	  ON ( NDRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =WDNRTFR.BDL_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND NDRVD.BK_SS_CD=WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD)
      INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_SRVC_FIN_ACCOUNT_PID_MAP EV
      ON (EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE=WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD)
       /*Q4FY15_ICPM_OCMS_FIX*/
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT 
     ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY)
       LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL/*Q3FY16*/
      ON /*NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
      AND */WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
     ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
    ON WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

	 THEN -9999
         WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  and /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
     ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')	/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/

	  )	 /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN -6666

 FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,

		 THEN -9999
             WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND  /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
        ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		    OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN -6666 
             WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N'  AND /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
        ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
            OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 		THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,    /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
     FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,

        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS Change */
	 ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50))  AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERGE_CG FNL
     INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
     AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
      ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN  
      (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , 
      NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
     NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE              
      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
      ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
      ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
     ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /*END */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
      ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME 
    WHERE NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG = 'N'
 AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N'  /*ADDED TO RESTRICT ATTRIBUTION_CD DERIVATION FOR TSV TRXNS*/
 AND NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME<>'MERAKI-LICENSE' /*ADDED TO RESTRICT ATTRIBUTION_CD DERIVATION FOR MERAKI TRXNS*/
     UNION ALL 
      SELECT    /* OA Q1FY15 - RAEREV/RAECOGS */
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
         CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND  /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
           ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
             OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','OM-FBINV')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
			 )	/*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 	  
           AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
			 THEN -9999
                         WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND  /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
           ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		     OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			 ) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN -6666 
             WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N'  AND /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
           ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
             OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN ('XAAS'))
			 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			 )		   /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
    FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
              CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS*/
          ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
            OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			)	 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)  ELSE -9999 END SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'  THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY   ELSE  FNL.PRODUCT_KEY  END  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y ' THEN 'ATTRIBUTED' ELSE  'STANDALONE'    END  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
      FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS Change */
   ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50))  AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_CG FNL
     INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
     AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN 
      (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
      NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
     NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE              
      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
      ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
      ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
      ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /*END*/
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
      ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
     WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
     AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='N'
     AND FNL.TSV_FLAG='N'
     AND 1=2 /*CHANGED AS PART OF RAO*/
     /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA-Q1FY16 to restrixt XAAS-OA data*/
   
     /*Added the below code as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA-Q1FY16 to Derive OA columns of XAAS-OA data*/ 
   
    UNION ALL
     SELECT
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
        CASE WHEN  FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
          WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CDC'  THEN CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER) END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
          CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
        ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
          OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ'  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		  )		/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER)
             ELSE CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
   FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         CASE WHEN FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG = 'Y'  THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
             ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
        EOXRNR.LINE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE1 AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        NP.ITEM_KEY  AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
        NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE = 'MULTIPLE Performance Obligations (MPOB)' THEN 'MPOB' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  POB_TYPE_CD /*NRS Change */
	 ,CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN BUNDLE_TYPE ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_CG FNL
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
    ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
       ON  EOXRNR.NET_REVENUE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
       AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
       AND EOXRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
       ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
       AND SATL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
       ON FNL.SK_TRX_ID_INT = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2
    AND SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution'   
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID  
     AND SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
       ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EXT_ALL.SKU 
     WHERE FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG IN ('Y','O')
     AND FNL.TSV_FLAG='N'
     AND 1=2 /*CHANGED AS PART OF RAO*/
     UNION ALL
     
     SELECT
         FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY,
         CASE WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN  CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER) 
        WHEN FNL.BK_SS_CD =  'CDC' THEN  CAST (-4444 AS INTEGER)  END  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
              CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
         ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		    OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN CAST (-6666 AS INTEGER)
              ELSE CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         FNL.PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
           CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
             ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
               OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
			   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
			   )	 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
              ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         COALESCE(CAST (EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT),-9999) AS  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
  NOA.PRODUCT_KEY         AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
         'ATTRIBUTED'    AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      ,COALESCE(NOA_MPOB.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
	  ,COALESCE(NOA_NOAH.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
       FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_MERGE_CG FNL
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRNR
     ON SRNR.COGS_PERCENT_KEY=FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
     AND SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
    INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRNR
     ON SRNR.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID = EOXRNR.COGS_PERCENT_ID
     AND  SRNR.SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC')
     AND SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = EOXRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
     ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = CAST(EOXRNR.ATTRIBUTE10 AS INTEGER)
     AND SATL.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
     ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME  
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
  /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/
    INNER JOIN (SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
        WHERE TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM' AND ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='OFFSET' GROUP BY 1,2) NOA
        ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY,POB_TYPE_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE  /*NRS Change */
        WHERE TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM' AND POB_TYPE_CD='MPOB' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA_MPOB
        ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA_MPOB.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     AND FNL.PRODUCT_KEY=NOA_MPOB.PRODUCT_KEY
	     LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY,BUNDLE_TYPE_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE  /*NRS Change */
        WHERE TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM' AND BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA_NOAH
        ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA_NOAH.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     AND FNL.PRODUCT_KEY=NOA_NOAH.PRODUCT_KEY
    WHERE 
    FNL.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'
    AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'    
    AND 1=2 /*CHANGED AS PART OF RAO*/	
    UNION ALL  
     /*Added the below code as part of SOT-XAAS-OA-Q1FY16 to Derive columns of XAAS-OA BUNDLE AND STANDALONE data*/ 
    SELECT   /*OA Q4FY17 -INV/REV*/
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
                  CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
         ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
          OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		  )		 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY   
    ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		 FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
                CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
         ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
          OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		  )		 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
       ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
		-9999 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
    FNL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
       CASE WHEN (WI_STND_DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL AND FNL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD='REVERSE') THEN 'STANDALONE'
         WHEN (NOA_OFFSET.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL AND NOA_ATRBTN.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL) THEN 'BUNDLE' 
      ELSE 'STANDALONE' 
         END  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, /*sabanil: modified as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS Change */
	 ,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50))  AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERGE_CG FNL
     INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
     AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
	 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
        WHERE ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='OFFSET' GROUP BY 1) NOA_OFFSET
    ON NOA_OFFSET.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
        WHERE ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1) NOA_ATRBTN
    ON NOA_ATRBTN.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_TRX_STNDALONE_DRVD GROUP BY 1) WI_STND_DRVD
    ON FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WI_STND_DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 /* Q3FY18 SO/SOL CHANGE */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
   ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /* END*/
    WHERE NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG = 'Y'       
 AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N'  /*ADDED TO RESTRICT ATTRIBUTION_CD DERIVATION FOR TSV TRXNS*/
 AND NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME<>'MERAKI-LICENSE' /*ADDED TO RESTRICT ATTRIBUTION_CD DERIVATION FOR MERAKI TRXNS*/

 ,BUNDLEOFF.EDW_UPDATE_DTM

 ,BUNDLEOFF.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,BUNDLEOFF.DV_PRODUCT_KEY

,BUNDLEOFF.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT

,BUNDLEOFF.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
 FROM
 (SELECT  
 A.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 A.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
 A.BK_SS_CD,
 A.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,

 A.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG,
 A.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,

   CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
   ELSE 'N' 
   END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 A.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG, 
 A.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
 A.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 A.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 A.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 A.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 A.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 /*A.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,*/
 COALESCE(BNDL.TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,0) AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,

   WHEN A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
   WHEN A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1
   ELSE A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY

     when A.BK_SS_CD = 'BV' then -997
     when A.BK_SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC') then -995  END as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,

A.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
 FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P A
  /*>>BUNDLE QTY*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_BNDL_QTY BNDL
  ON (BNDL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = A.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND BNDL.BK_SS_CD = A.BK_SS_CD )
  /*<<BUNDLE QTY*/
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_TRX_CONTRACT_NUM_P WDRTCN 
   ON ( WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =A.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND WDRTCN.BK_SS_CD=A.BK_SS_CD)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON
 (A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY)
 WHERE A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'
 AND A.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV', 'REV') 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT  
 A.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 A.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
 A.BK_SS_CD,

 A.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT *-1,
 A.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT *-1,
 A.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,

 A.LINE_TYPE_CD,

 A.GL_DTM,
 A.GL_POSTED_DTM,

 'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG,
 A.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
 A.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,

 A.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
 A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 A.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     ,
 A.AR_TRX_KEY,
 A.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 A.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,

 A.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
   CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
   ELSE 'N' 
   END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 A.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG, 
 A.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
 A.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 A.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 A.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT *-1,
 A.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT *-1,
 A.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT *-1,
 /*A.DV_EXTENDED_QTY *-1,*/
 COALESCE(BNDL.TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,0)*-1 AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 A.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
 WDRTCN.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
 A.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 A.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
 A.SHIPPED_DT,
 A.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 A.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
 A.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT *-1,
 A.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,
 A.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 A.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 A.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY,
 A.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
 A.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 A.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
 A.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT *-1,
 A.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
 A.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
 A.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 'UNKNOWN' as FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
 A.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
 A.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 A.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
 A.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
 A.SALES_REP_NUM,
 A.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 A.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
 (CASE WHEN A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1
   WHEN A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
   WHEN A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1
   ELSE A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
   END) RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY, /* Need to Chk */
 A.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 A.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 A.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 A.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 A.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY , 
 case when A.BK_SS_CD = 'QTC' then -996 
     when A.BK_SS_CD = 'BV' then -997
     when A.BK_SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC') then -995  END as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 A.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 A.DV_TRX_AMT *-1,
 A.DV_FUNC_AMT *-1,
 -999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 A.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 A.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 'OFFSET' AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 'I' DML_TYPE,
 A.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
 A.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT*-1 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
 A.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT * -1 AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
A.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT * -1 AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
 FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P A
  
    /*>>BUNDLE QTY*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_BNDL_QTY BNDL
  ON (BNDL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = A.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND BNDL.BK_SS_CD = A.BK_SS_CD )
  /*<<BUNDLE QTY*/
  
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_TRX_CONTRACT_NUM_P WDRTCN 
   ON ( WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =A.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND WDRTCN.BK_SS_CD=A.BK_SS_CD)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON
 (A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY)
 WHERE A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'
 AND A.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV', 'REV') 
 ) BUNDLEOFF
 , (SEL Coalesce(Max(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT  FROM 
( SELECT Coalesce(Max(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P 
  UNION ALL
SELECT Coalesce(Max(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_NA_P
UNION ALL
SELECT Coalesce(Max(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG) SM_MAX)SM_MAX

SELECT 
 RANK() OVER(ORDER BY WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD) + SMDNRTFRKEY.MAX_VAL DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  ,
 WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  ,
 WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD ,
 USER ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)              
 FROM 
 (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR ) SMDNRTFRKEY,  
 $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REVB  WDNRTFR
 WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR 
   WHERE WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD
   AND WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT )

SELECT  
     FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
     FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
     DNATIL.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,
     FNL.BK_SS_CD,
      FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
CAST(COALESCE(
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
    THEN 0.0000000 
    ELSE ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
        THEN CASE /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation
            WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
            */
            WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME)  = 'RMA with Credit' 
               OR
              (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
            THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
                THEN COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
                ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
              END
            WHEN ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')))
			AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'
            THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
                THEN COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
                ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
              END
            ELSE 0.0000000
          END
        ELSE CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
            THEN COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
            ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
          END
        END
     )
     *( CASE  WHEN FNL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD IN ('GL','INV_GL')
        THEN CAST(COALESCE(CAST(FNL.SPLIT_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
              * 
              COALESCE(CAST(NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
            ) 
        ELSE 100.0000000
      END)
    END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY

      ON WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      WHERE NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG='Y'
) FNL
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
  ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
  ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
  ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
  AND  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD

  INNER JOIN

   NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG,

   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
   ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
   ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
   ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME 
  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
  INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
ON SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=FNL.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY        
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
ON (FNL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
     ON (FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
     ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
     ON FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
     ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = FNL.GLOBAL_NAME )
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_BE_INV_LNS_DST_AL EOCBILDA
     ON ( EOCBILDA.BE_INVOICE_LINE_DIST_ID = EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 
     AND EOCBILDA.GLOBAL_NAME= EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME

      /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'

    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL

       /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR

CAST(COALESCE(

    THEN 0.0000000 
    ELSE ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
        THEN CASE /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation
            WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
            */
            WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME)  = 'RMA with Credit' 
               OR
              (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
            THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
                THEN COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
                ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
              END
            WHEN ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')))
			AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'
            THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
                THEN COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
                ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
              END
            ELSE 0.0000000
          END
        ELSE CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
            THEN COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
            ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
          END
        END
     )
     *( CASE  WHEN FNL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD IN ('INV_GL','GL','ADJ')
        THEN CAST(COALESCE(CAST(FNL.SPLIT_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
              * 
              COALESCE(CAST(CAST( TRIM(EOXRNR.ATTRIBUTE2) AS VARCHAR(18) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)                 
            ) 
        ELSE 100.0000000
      END)
    END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL

AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)

      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL

      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR

 WHERE FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RAE_COGS','RAE_REVENUE')

            WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME)  = 'RMA with Credit'

            THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'

            WHEN ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')))
			AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'
            THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'

                ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)

            ELSE COALESCE(CAST(DNATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
