  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
  ON FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
  ON FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY= SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY */
  INNER JOIN  
   (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
   NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
   NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , 
   NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
   NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, 
   NATIL_PAR.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY,
   NATIL_PAR.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY,
   NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, 
   NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, 
   NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE              
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
   ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
   ON  FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = DNATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL  
   ON DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  AND FNL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME 
  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
  INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
ON SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=FNL.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY        
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
ON (FNL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
     ON (FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
     ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
     ON FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
     ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = FNL.GLOBAL_NAME )
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_BE_INV_LNS_DST_AL EOCBILDA
     ON ( EOCBILDA.BE_INVOICE_LINE_DIST_ID = EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 
     AND EOCBILDA.GLOBAL_NAME= EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME 
     AND EOCBILDA.INVOICE_TYPE = 'Original Line')*/
      /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
     ON (FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
     AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL   
     ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
     ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
       /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
  ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = FNL.GLOBAL_NAME
  
 WHERE FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'INV'
AND DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, FNL.AR_TRX_KEY, DNATIL.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, FNL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD
ORDER BY FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, FNL.AR_TRX_KEY, FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, FNL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD)=1

SELECT   /*OA Q4FY17 -- OPEN RMA */
      FNL.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
      FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
      FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
      FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
      NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
      NDCA.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
      FNL.BK_SS_CD,
      FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
      NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
      NDCA.BK_OFFER_ATRBTN_ID_INT  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
      NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
      NDCA.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
      FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_MERGE_CG FNL
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT NDCA
 ON NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=FNL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

SELECT 
   RANK() OVER(ORDER BY WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD) + SMDNRTFRKEY.MAX_VAL DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  ,
   WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  ,
   WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD ,
   USER ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)              
   FROM 
   (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR ) SMDNRTFRKEY,  
   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ATRBTN_REF  WDNRTFR
   WHERE 
   NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR 
     WHERE WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD
     AND WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT )

SELECT
  DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_SS_CD , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD_TOPSKU
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    /*TSV ACRL CHANGES*/
  INNER JOIN (
  SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOARL 
  WHERE PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0 AND ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='ATTRIBUTED'
  GROUP BY 1) NOA_ATRBTN
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA_ATRBTN.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN (
  SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOARL 
  WHERE RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0 AND ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='OFFSET'
  GROUP BY 1) NOA_OFFSET
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA_OFFSET.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE'
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD'
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV')
  AND CAST(DRVD_TOPSKU.GL_DTM AS DATE) BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'                           
  AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N' /*ADDING THIS FILTER TO RESTRICT ACCRUAL DATA QUALIFICATION*/
  AND NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME<>'MERAKI-LICENSE' /*ADDING THIS FILTER TO RESTRICT MERAKI DATA QUALIFICATION*/
  
  UNION ALL
  
  /*ADDED AS PART OF ACCRUAL CHANGES Q2FY19*/
  
  SELECT
  DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_SS_CD , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD_TOPSKU
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
  INNER JOIN (
  SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NMRT 
  WHERE NMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD='CLEARING_ACCOUNT' AND NMRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
  GROUP BY 1) NMRT_OA
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NMRT_OA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE'
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD'
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=-999 /*NOT TO QUALIFY GL MERAKI TRANSACTIONS*/
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV')
  AND CAST(DRVD_TOPSKU.GL_DTM AS DATE) BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  /*AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'   */                        
  AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' /*ADDING THIS FILTER TO ALLOW ACCRUAL DATA QUALIFICATION*/
  UNION ALL 
 /*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI CHANGES Q2FY19*/
  SELECT
  DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_SS_CD , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD_TOPSKU
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON DRVD_TOPSKU.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
  INNER JOIN (
  SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT 
  WHERE NMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE_SHARE' AND NMRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
  GROUP BY 1) NMRT_OA
  ON DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NMRT_OA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE'
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD'
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=-999 /*NOT TO QUALIFY GL MERAKI TRANSACTIONS*/
  AND DRVD_TOPSKU.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV')
  AND CAST(DRVD_TOPSKU.GL_DTM AS DATE) BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  /*AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'   */                        
  AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N' /*ADDING THIS FILTER TO RESTRICT ACCRUAL DATA QUALIFICATION*/
  AND NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME='MERAKI-LICENSE'
  
  /* Below UNION ALL added to qualify NOAH service lines for FORWARD AND REVERSAL generation*/
  
  UNION ALL
  
SELECT
DRVD_NOAH.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
DRVD_NOAH.BK_SS_CD ,
DRVD_NOAH.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD ,
DRVD_NOAH.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
DRVD_NOAH.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD_NOAH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON DRVD_NOAH.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON DRVD_NOAH.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*TSV ACRL CHANGES*/

INNER JOIN (
SELECT SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,HW_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OA_SERVICE_ORDER_LINE NOARL
WHERE SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0
QUALIFY Row_Number() Over(PARTITION BY SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM   DESC)=1
) EL_NOAH
ON DRVD_NOAH.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=EL_NOAH.SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

WHERE DRVD_NOAH.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE'
AND DRVD_NOAH.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD'
AND DRVD_NOAH.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')
AND DRVD_NOAH.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999
AND DRVD_NOAH.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV')
AND CAST(DRVD_NOAH.GL_DTM AS DATE) BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND   EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NRT 
  WHERE PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0 AND ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='OFFSET'
  AND NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=EL_NOAH.HW_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  )

SELECT
   FWDREV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
   ,ROW_NUMBER() over (order by FWDREV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, FWDREV.BK_SS_CD ) + SM_MAX.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT as BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,FWDREV.BK_SS_CD                      
   ,FWDREV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
   ,FWDREV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
   ,FWDREV.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      
   ,FWDREV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
   ,FWDREV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
   ,FWDREV.LINE_TYPE_CD

   ,FWDREV.GL_DTM

   ,FWDREV.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT

   ,FWDREV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,FWDREV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,FWDREV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,FWDREV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,FWDREV.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,FWDREV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  
   ,FWDREV.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  
   ,FWDREV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,FWDREV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
   ,FWDREV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
   ,FWDREV.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           
   ,FWDREV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
   ,FWDREV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
   ,FWDREV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
   ,FWDREV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
   ,FWDREV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
   ,FWDREV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
   ,FWDREV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  
   ,FWDREV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT           
   ,FWDREV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
   ,FWDREV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
   ,FWDREV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          
   ,FWDREV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM 
   ,FWDREV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
   ,FWDREV.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   
   ,FWDREV.SHIPPED_DT                    
   ,FWDREV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           
   ,FWDREV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,FWDREV.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT 
   ,FWDREV.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         
   ,FWDREV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
   ,FWDREV.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                
   ,FWDREV.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY 
   ,FWDREV.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
   ,FWDREV.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               
   ,FWDREV.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        
   ,FWDREV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT         
   ,FWDREV.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     
   ,FWDREV.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       
   ,FWDREV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
   ,FWDREV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          
   ,FWDREV.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
   ,FWDREV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         
   ,FWDREV.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
   ,FWDREV.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
   ,FWDREV.EDW_CREATE_USER               
   ,FWDREV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
   ,FWDREV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
   ,FWDREV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
   ,FWDREV.SALES_REP_NUM                 
   ,FWDREV.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
   ,FWDREV.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     
   ,FWDREV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
   ,FWDREV.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                
   ,FWDREV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,FWDREV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            
   ,FWDREV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      
   ,FWDREV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            
   ,FWDREV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,FWDREV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
   ,FWDREV.DV_TRX_AMT                    
   ,FWDREV.DV_FUNC_AMT                   
   ,FWDREV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
   ,FWDREV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
   ,FWDREV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
   ,FWDREV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  
   ,FWDREV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   
   ,FWDREV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,FWDREV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY   
   ,FWDREV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT    
   ,FWDREV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
   ,FWDREV.ACTION_CODE                   
   ,FWDREV.DML_TYPE 
   ,FWDREV.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,FWDREV.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   FROM
   (SELECT 
   REV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
   ,REV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,REV.BK_SS_CD                      
   ,REV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1    GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,REV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
   ,REV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
   ,REV.LINE_TYPE_CD                  
   ,REV.SPLIT_PCT * -1   SPLIT_PCT                   
   ,REV.GL_DTM                        
   ,REV.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
   ,REV.RULE_START_DTM                
   ,'REVERSE' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            
   ,'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG               
   ,REV.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        
   ,REV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
   ,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT      
   ,REV.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE   
   ,RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT    AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT    
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,REV.AR_TRX_KEY  
          , CASE WHEN /*NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS')*/
     ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   ) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY 
     ELSE REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
	 END

    ,REV.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT

  FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_REV_TRX_STNDALONE_DRVD WI_STND_DRVD

    AND WI_STND_DRVD.BK_SS_CD = REV.BK_SS_CD ) 
   
  /*ADDED AS PART OF SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCNT_KEY ENABLEMENT Q2FY18*/
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL

    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT

     ON (WI_STND_DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = REV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
     AND WI_STND_DRVD.BK_SS_CD = REV.BK_SS_CD ) 
    
   /*ADDED AS PART OF SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCNT_KEY ENABLEMENT Q2FY18*/
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     /*TSV ACCRUALS JAN18*/
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS

   (SELECT * FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD

                 , CASE WHEN /*NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS') */
      (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
          OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))

		  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		  )	  /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY

   ,FWD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY

           , FWD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY

    ,FWD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
    ,FWD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          
    ,FWD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
    ,FWD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME

    ,FWD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
    ,USER EDW_CREATE_USER

    ,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
    ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
    ,FWD.SALES_REP_NUM

    ,FWD.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     
    ,FWD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
    ,FWD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                
    ,FWD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
    ,FWD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            
    ,FWD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD

    ,FWD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME

    ,FWD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
    ,FWD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT

    ,FWD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD

    ,FWD.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_REV_LEASE_CLASSIFICATION   WI_STND_DRVD /* New Table */
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV FWD
     ON (WI_STND_DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = FWD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   AND WI_STND_DRVD.BK_SS_CD = FWD.BK_SS_CD )
  
      /*ADDED AS PART OF SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCNT_KEY ENABLEMENT Q2FY18*/
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FWD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     /*TSV ACCRUALS JAN18*/
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
    
  
     (SELECT * FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD
        INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY1
     ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID =RFMY1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)RFMY
            WHERE FWD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG <> WI_STND_DRVD.CORP_REVENUE_FLG
  /* Below UNION ALL added to generate offset for NOAH service lines */
  
	/* Below UNION ALL added to generate offset for NOAH service lines */
	
UNION ALL
SELECT 
   NOAH_OFFSET.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.BK_SS_CD                      
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1    GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.LINE_TYPE_CD                  
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SPLIT_PCT * -1   SPLIT_PCT                   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.GL_DTM                        
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.RULE_START_DTM                
   ,'FORWARD' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            
   ,'Y' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG               
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
   ,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT      
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE   
   ,RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT    AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT    
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.AR_TRX_KEY  
     , CASE WHEN /*NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS')*/
     ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   ) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY 
     ELSE NOAH_OFFSET.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
     END
     AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY               
    ,NOAH_OFFSET.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_MISC_FLG                   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * -1     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  * -1 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT * -1        DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_EXTENDED_QTY * -1          DV_EXTENDED_QTY        
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SHIPPED_DT                    
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT * -1 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT * -1      DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
   ,USER EDW_CREATE_USER               
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM                
   ,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SALES_REP_NUM                 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_TRX_AMT                    
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_FUNC_AMT                   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   ,'OFFSET' DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY   
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * -1 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT  
   ,'I' AS ACTION_CODE                   
   ,'I' AS DML_TYPE 
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT * -1 AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
   ,NOAH_OFFSET.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT * -1 AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
  FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_REV_TRX_STNDALONE_DRVD WI_STND_DRVD
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV NOAH_OFFSET
    ON (WI_STND_DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = NOAH_OFFSET.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
    AND WI_STND_DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NOAH_OFFSET.BK_SS_CD ) 
   
  /*ADDED AS PART OF SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCNT_KEY ENABLEMENT Q2FY18*/
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOAH_OFFSET.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     /*TSV ACCRUALS JAN18*/
   
   INNER JOIN (
	SELECT SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_OA_SERVICE_ORDER_LINE NOARL
	WHERE SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0
	GROUP BY 1) EL_NOAH
	ON NOAH_OFFSET.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=EL_NOAH.SERVICE_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,   
  (SELECT * FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD
       INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY1
    ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID =RFMY1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)RFMY
	
  )FWDREV
      INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM
 (
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REVB 
  UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_NA_P
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG)  SM ) SM_MAX
 ON 1=1

  AND NOT EXISTS 
 (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RV_P REV_P
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=REV_P.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  WHERE FWDREV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
  AND REV_P.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV')
  AND REV_P.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE IS NULL
  )

   WDNRAM.DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
   WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT        ,
   WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD                      ,
   WDNRAM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
   WDNRAM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
   WDNRAM.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
   WDNRAM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,

   WDNRAM.GL_DTM                        ,
   WDNRAM.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
   WDNRAM.RULE_START_DTM                ,
   WDNRAM.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            ,
   WDNRAM.LAST_RECORD_FLG               ,
   WDNRAM.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
   WDNRAM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
   WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    ,
   WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     ,
   WDNRAM.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
   WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
   WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
   WDNRAM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
   WDNRAM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
   WDNRAM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
   WDNRXOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY         , 
   WDNRAM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
   WDNRAM.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
   WDNRAM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
   WDNRAM.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
   WDNRXOA.PRODUCT_KEY                  ,
   WDNRAM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          ,
   WDNRAM.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
   WDNRAM.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
   WDNRAM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
   WDNRAM.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
   WDNRAM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
   WDNRAM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
   WDNRAM.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
   WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
   WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  ,
   WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT           ,

   WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
   WDNRAM.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
   WDNRAM.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
   WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
   WDNRAM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
   WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
   WDNRAM.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
   WDNRAM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
   WDNRAM.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
   WDNRAM.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
   WDNRAM.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRAM.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
   WDNRAM.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
   WDNRAM.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT         ,
   WDNRAM.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     ,
   WDNRAM.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       ,
   WDNRAM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
   WDNRAM.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
   WDNRAM.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
   WDNRAM.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
   WDNRAM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
   WDNRAM.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
   WDNRAM.SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
   WDNRAM.DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
   WDNRAM.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     ,
   CASE WHEN WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD = 'CG' THEN -7777
        WHEN WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD =  'CDC' THEN -4444
		END RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
   WDNRAM.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
   WDNRAM.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
   WDNRAM.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
   WDNRAM.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,

   WDNRAM.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME         AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  ,
   WDNRAM.AMOUNT               AS DV_TRX_AMT         ,
   WDNRAM.ACCTD_AMOUNT        AS DV_FUNC_AMT  ,
   /* OA Q3FY14 */
   WDNRXOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRXOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN WDNRXOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' THEN WDNRAM.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE WDNRXOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
   WDNRXOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   WDNRAM.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  WDNRAM.POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    WDNRAM.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
   0.0000000  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
   WDNRXOA.POB_TYPE_CD,

   WDNRXOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
  FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_ADJ_MERGE_CG  WDNRAM
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_CSPP_VIP WDNRXOA
   ON WDNRXOA.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WDNRAM.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
   AND WDNRXOA.BK_SS_CD = WDNRAM.BK_SS_CD
   WHERE WDNRAM.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('CSPP_VIP_ADJ')

SELECT  
         FNL.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         NDCA.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         FNL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
         FNL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
         FNL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
         FNL.POS_TRX_ID_INT,
         NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY  AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
		 NDCA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /* NRS Changes*/
		 NDCA.POB_TYPE_CD,
		 NDCA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
	   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_ADJ_MERGE_CG FNL
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NDCA
    ON NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=FNL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
    AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN  
    (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) 
  IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES')  AND LANG = 'US')        
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT  
         FNL.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
         FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
         NDCA.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
         FNL.BK_SS_CD,
         FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
         FNL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
         FNL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
         FNL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
         FNL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
         FNL.POS_TRX_ID_INT,
         NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY  AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
		 NDCA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
		 NDCA.POB_TYPE_CD   ,
		 NDCA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
	   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_ADJ_MERGE_CG FNL
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NDCA
    ON NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=FNL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
    AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN  
    (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) 
  IN ('CISCO NRS TRANSITION')  AND LANG = 'US')

SELECT   
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
        NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
                CASE WHEN ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
                 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND  NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND  NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
				 ) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/    
    	  THEN NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
        ELSE  FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
        FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
                CASE WHEN ( ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		           OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
				   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
				   ) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
            THEN NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        ELSE FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
       CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        FNL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
        CASE WHEN (WI_STND_DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL AND FNL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD='REVERSE') THEN 'STANDALONE'
		     WHEN ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'BUNDLE'
			 ELSE 'STANDALONE'
         END  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, 
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD
		,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
		
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERGE_CG FNL
     INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
     ON  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	 
	 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  
     LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  FROM 
     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX WHERE ACCT_CLASS_CD='CLEARING_ACCOUNT' 
     AND ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1) ACRL
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*RECHECK*/
  
     INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
     ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
     NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
     INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
     ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
     ON NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY=NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
     ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
     ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_TRX_STNDALONE_DRVD GROUP BY 1) WI_STND_DRVD
     ON FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WI_STND_DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     WHERE 
	 NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y'
	 /*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI CHANGES Q2FY19*/
	 UNION ALL 
	 SELECT   
        FNL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_KEY        ,
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
        FNL.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
        FNL.BK_SS_CD,
        FNL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
        FNL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
       -9999 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
        FNL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
		CASE WHEN (WI_STND_DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL AND FNL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD='REVERSE') THEN 'STANDALONE'
             WHEN MERK.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE' ELSE 'BUNDLE' END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, 
        FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        ,'UNKNOWN' POB_TYPE_CD 
		,CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
        FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERGE_CG FNL
        INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT
        ON FNL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
        ON  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
		ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,ATTRIBUTION_CD FROM 
        $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX WHERE ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE_SHARE' GROUP BY 1,2) MERK
        ON FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=MERK.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*RECHECK*/
		LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_TRX_STNDALONE_DRVD GROUP BY 1) WI_STND_DRVD
        ON FNL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WI_STND_DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
        WHERE 
	    NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ('MERAKI-LICENSE')
